backend/main.mo: Main backend actor managing diagram state (icons, connections, drawings, lines, text labels) and user profiles with authorization mixins, providing CRUD operations for named diagrams and user profiles with permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four features: fixing LoadDiagramDialog display, adding font size control to text tool, enabling manual line breaks in text labels, and updating useAttackPathState hook for font size management.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and utilities for a threat hunting portal with attack path visualization, report management, and MITRE ATT&CK integration.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for a security-focused UI with dark blue/teal palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Threat Hunting Portal application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/index.ts: Example code snippet demonstrating html2canvas usage for exporting canvas elements to PNG images.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication, profile setup modal, and route protection requiring login for all pages.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive canvas component handling icon placement with resize/rotate, connections, freehand/line/arrow drawing, text labels with multi-line textarea input, eraser mode, element selection, and transform tool with visual handles.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: SVG connector component rendering directional arrows between icons with hover effects and click handling for deletion.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Renders draggable icons for attack path elements, mapping IconType to asset image paths and handling drag-and-drop initialization.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Provides a sidebar toolbar with draggable attack path icons, drawing tool selection (freehand, line, arrow, eraser, text), and diagram management actions (save, load, export, clear, undo) with text formatting controls.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with header navigation, hero banner on homepage, user profile display, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Dialog for loading saved attack path diagrams with list view showing metadata (icons, connections, text labels, last modified) and delete functionality with confirmation.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a logout button when authenticated, clearing Internet Identity session and React Query cache on click.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Full-page login screen with Internet Identity authentication, displaying security messaging and login button with loading state.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: Searchable combobox for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques from predefined data, with support for adding custom techniques and displaying selected items as removable badges.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: Button component that triggers PDF generation for a report using the pdfGenerator utility, showing loading state and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for initial user profile setup that prompts for a name and saves it using the useSaveCallerUserProfile hook. Cannot be dismissed and shows loading state during save.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports with fields for title, author, executive summary, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, timeline, attack vectors, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, and recommendations. Includes dynamic array fields with add/remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: Dialog component for saving attack path diagrams with a name input field. Handles save/cancel actions and displays loading state during save operation.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Static data file containing MITRE ATT&CK technique definitions with IDs, names, and descriptions covering tactics like Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, and Privilege Escalation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and initializing access control. Invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: Custom hook managing attack path diagram state including placed icons, connections, drawings, text labels, drawing tools, and undo history with a maximum of 50 states. Provides functions for adding, moving, resizing, and removing elements.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: React Query mutation hook for deleting diagram states by ID, invalidating the allDiagrams query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all saved diagrams from the backend actor, enabled only when actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile, with custom loading state that accounts for actor initialization and no retry on failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a specific diagram state by ID from the backend actor, enabled only when actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (getAllReports, getReport, saveReport, deleteReport) but all are disabled/stubbed since backend no longer supports these methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile via the actor and invalidates the currentUserProfile query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook that saves a named diagram state via the actor and invalidates both diagramState and allDiagrams query caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors, including primary, secondary, destructive, and chart color definitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Attack path diagram editor page with toolbar, canvas, and dialogs for saving/loading diagrams; manages placement, connections, drawings, and text labels with undo support.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page for creating threat hunt reports with a form that collects report data and saves it via useSaveReport mutation, showing toast notifications on success/failure.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed view of a threat hunt report including executive summary, timeline, attack vectors, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and findings with PDF download capability.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: React component that displays a table of all threat hunting reports with metadata (title, author, date, technique/IOC counts), supports viewing, downloading PDFs, and deleting reports with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for html2canvas library type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for jspdf library type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility function that generates a professionally formatted PDF report by opening a new window with styled HTML content including report metadata, threat actors, MITRE ATT&CK techniques, IOCs, and findings sections.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended utilities for shadows/animations, typography and container query plugins, and design tokens for a security-focused UI theme.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration for React app with path aliases, environment variable injection for canister IDs, proxy setup for local API calls, and global polyfills for Internet Computer integration.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features (threat hunting report forms, MITRE ATT&CK integration, PDF generation, report listing), known issues (transform tool, IC deployment, diagram loading), and architectural state at version 35.
